## Test plan

<!-- Manual steps a reviewer can follow. -->

## Privacy review

- [ ] Does this change add or remove any of the following for users whose personal data we process?
  - a sub-processor (OpenAI, Anthropic, analytics, crash reporter, CDN, email provider…)
  - an AI system processing personal data
  - a new data category or purpose
  - automated decision-making or profiling
  - a contact form, chat, or other inbound data channel

  If **yes**: update `/privacy/<product>.html`, bump its `Last updated` date, and add a line to its changelog.
  If **no**: tick and move on.
